path.style: fill: none; stroke: #000000; stroke-width: 0.6; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-linecap: square

text.style: font-size: 6.4px; font-family: 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #555555

g.text: Each cell shows whether a method-scenario metric passed (P) or fell below (F) its predeclared threshold. Colour shows metric/threshold ratio; each panel displays only metrics actually defined and calculated for that scenario.
